_meta.description: Synthetic demo scenarios for Nexus Sandbox — TKT-0135
_meta.dataType: SYNTHETIC — no real client, business, or personal data

scenarios.name: Route-a-Request
scenarios.description: Mini Yoda receives a business request, selects model tier, routes to Aria
scenarios.demoPrompt: I need a market analysis for our new AI consulting offering targeting mid-market financial services companies.

scenarios.name: Approval Flow Demo
scenarios.description: Demonstrates S2 HITL approval gate with a synthetic high-value task
scenarios.demoPrompt: Prepare a draft proposal for AcmeCorp — potential $250k engagement.
expectedFlow: Mini Yoda classifies as S2 (requires approval)
Presents approval request to demo operator

scenarios.name: Business Brief
scenarios.description: Aria generates a structured business analysis from a synthetic brief
scenarios.demoPrompt: Summarise the competitive landscape for AI-powered workflow automation in the Australian SME market.

scenarios.name: Email Draft
scenarios.description: Aria drafts a professional follow-up email for a fictitious client meeting
scenarios.demoPrompt: Draft a follow-up email to Sarah Chen at BlueSky Financial after our discovery call today. Key points: explored their onboarding automation challenge, proposed a 4-week pilot, next step is a technical brief from their CTO.

scenarios.name: Meeting Summary
scenarios.description: Aria summarises a synthetic meeting transcript

scenarios.name: Governance Demo
scenarios.description: Shows Lex review overlay on a draft contract clause (synthetic compliance check)
scenarios.demoPrompt: Review this draft data processing clause for compliance risks: 'The Service Provider may retain and use anonymised client data for product improvement purposes for up to 36 months following contract termination.'
expectedFlow: Lex governance layer runs synthetic review

scenarios.name: Multi-Agent Handoff
scenarios.description: Full end-to-end: Mini Yoda orchestrates, delegates to Aria, Aria responds, Mini Yoda summarises
scenarios.demoPrompt: I need a one-page brief on why our prospect TechVantage Solutions should consider Nexus for their AI strategy.

syntheticEntities.note: All companies and contacts are entirely fictitious. Any resemblance to real entities is coincidental.
